Class ReportTemplateBuilder

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<ReportTemplateBuilder, DRReportTemplate>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.ReportTemplateBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReportTemplateBuilder extends AbstractBuilder<ReportTemplateBuilder, DRReportTemplate>

ReportTemplateBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
